title: Senior Investment Banker at ICICI Bank

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at ICICI Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with ICICI Bank! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Jodhpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About ICICI Bank:
ICICI Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Bank!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
